message.content:
As an artificial intelligence created by Alibaba Cloud, I don't have personal feelings or beliefs. My purpose is to provide helpful and unbiased information and assistance. I don't hold opinions or biases toward any group of people. My function is to promote understanding, inclusivity, and positivity by interacting with users in a constructive manner.

If you have any questions or need help with something, feel free to ask, and I'll do my best to assist you!
